description: Adversarial: a seven-tool signup pipeline has zero branches or reasoning, so it stays workflow-anchored despite tool count.

conversation.text: For each new signup: verify email, check against blocklist, add to Postgres, send welcome email, add to Mailchimp, notify sales in Slack, log to Segment.

processExpectations: The agent explains that despite using seven different tools, the request has zero branches and zero runtime reasoning, and that the number of tools used does not by itself imply agentic behavior.
The agent does not classify the request as agent-anchored merely because it involves many different tools.
The agent calls the load_skill tool with the intent-recognition skill before classifying the request.
